scripts.mobile:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap sync && npx cap run android
